content:
## Available Personal Accounts
Northstar Bank offers four listed accounts for personal customers in this checking category. Use only these products when comparing this account type:

| Account | Monthly fee | Waiver balance | APY | Opening deposit |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Light Blue Account | 5 | 500 | 0.02 | 0 |
| Green Fee-Free Account | 0 | 0 | 0.01 | 0 |
| Blue Account | 12 | 1500 | 0.07 | 25 |
| Evergreen Account | 25 | 5000 | 0.15 | 100 |

## Early Closure Charges
If an account is closed inside its early-closure window, apply the matching charge for that account only.

| Account | Early closure fee | Window |
|---|---:|---:|
| Light Blue Account | 15 | 30 |
| Green Fee-Free Account | 15 | 30 |
| Blue Account | 25 | 60 |
| Evergreen Account | 50 | 90 |

## Comparison Notes
1. Compare monthly cost, waiver balance, APY, and opening deposit before recommending an account.
2. Green Fee-Free Account is the listed option with a 0 monthly fee and a 0 waiver balance.
3. See "Internal: Deposit Account Opening Eligibility" before opening any selected account, and see "Internal: Deposit Account Closure Policy" before quoting closure charges.
title: Checking Account Comparison Guide
